description: The company has decided to implement 'Wellness Fridays', meaning the standard work week will end at 12:00 PM on Fridays for all employees on the standard schedule. Log in to Odoo as admin (password: admin) and modify the "Standard 40 hours/week" working schedule to remove the Friday afternoon shift (13:00-17:00). Ensure the Friday morning shift (08:00-12:00) and all Monday-Thursday shifts remain unchanged.
